Our Content Process

From strategy to publication, we handle everything

1

Strategy & Research

Keyword research and content strategy tailored to your salon's goals and local market.

2

Content Creation

Professional writers create engaging, SEO-optimized content that resonates with your audience.

3

Optimization

Every post is optimized for search engines with proper keywords, meta tags, and structure.

4

Publication & Tracking

Content is published on schedule with performance tracking and ongoing optimization.
